highlights_headline: 3.119.4 adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4, Tizen x64/arm64 natives, Linux Bionic assets, and refreshes the AoT/Windows/Apple story.
highlights_body: It ships on the .NET 10 SDK, hardens Windows and Linux natives, fixes an AoT crash and a MAUI Android tab-switch regression, and rebuilds libpng, libwebp and brotli.

bullets.detail: Adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 built on the GirCore Gtk-4.0 bindings, giving GTK4 apps a first-class SKDrawingArea/SKGLArea host.

bullets.lead: MAUI Android SKGLView survives tab switches
bullets.detail: SKGLView now re-renders correctly after a MAUI TabBar switch on Android.

bullets.lead: AoT and Linux ARM64 crashes fixed
bullets.detail: SkiaSharp no longer crashes at startup on NativeAOT builds compiled with IlcDisableReflection=true, and the Linux ARM64 native library now bundles fontconfig correctly.
Fixes a Cairo assertion crash in the GTK4 SKDrawingArea, and switches the WindowsForms controls to use the DesignMode property directly.
D3D12 DLLs are now delay-loaded so the library keeps starting on systems without DirectX 12 installed.
Adds Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds (Studio 6.1) and Linux Bionic native assets, and splits the Tizen native CI into per-architecture jobs.
Splits the tvOS native builds and NativeReference targets into separate device and simulator frameworks, matching the iOS packaging.
Builds on the .NET 10 SDK with workload version-set pinning, and adds a net48 full-framework target for Windows validation via PolySharp.
SKManagedStream now uses an SKData snapshot instead of a parent/child chain, simplifying its lifetime and fixing subtle disposal ordering issues.
Updates libpng to 1.6.58 (via 1.6.54), libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and enforces -Wl,--no-undefined on Linux and Android native builds to catch missing symbols at link time.
Enables the Spectre mitigation flag on both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so.

contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Linux Bionic native assets, PolySharp-based C# 13 support on legacy TFMs, and the new net48 validation target
contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Enabled the Spectre mitigation flag on both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so
contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Moved the AI agent configuration to a shared location for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed SKGLView not rendering after a MAUI TabBar switch on Android

preview_summaries.p1: The 3.119.4 preview line collected the SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 package, Tizen x64/arm64 support, Linux Bionic assets, the .NET 10 SDK move, the SKManagedStream refactor, the AoT/ARM64 fixes and the libpng/libwebp/brotli refresh.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5 picks up the same Tizen, Linux Bionic and .NET 10 packaging work, plus the Spectre mitigation on both Windows and Linux natives.
